title: Breaking Place
description: Adds satisfying block destruction particles every time you place a block.
body:
# **What does this mod do?**

​**Every time you place a block**, the mod triggers the native **destruction particle** effect **around the block**.

It’s a **simple change**, but it adds a lot of dynamic energy and **makes building feel more satisfying**.

# **​Key Features:**

*   **​Vanilla Aesthetic**: Uses native Minecraft particles, ensuring it blends perfectly with the game’s original style.
*   **Performance**: This is a Client-Side mod. It has zero impact on server performance and won't cause any lag.
*   ​**Integration**: Works perfectly alongside popular optimization and visual mods.
